productDisplayName: Lotto Men's Dynamo Green Canvas Shoe
description: canvas shoes are the most versatile pair of footwear that one can ever own. Pair it with denims or corduroys and look equally glamorous with each combination. The fabric upper keeps your feet fresh all day, while the patterned outsole provides superior grip on any terrain.Upper Canvas upper for easy maintenance and durability Carbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper foot Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug Fit Lace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durability High ankle folded over and buttoned for style Midsole Foam insole for high energy return and cushioning Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Multi-directional pattern on the forefoot and heel, with embossed brand name Pivot points below the forefoot area for flexible movement shoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
